title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Orochi, Kaido, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Green Bull as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: UTA, listen, pirates have stormed the town....!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Save us, UTA-chan! The houses are burning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A pen! I need a pen!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ODA drew this extra, showing the moment UTA penned her 'new age' theme.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why won't you let me fight?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You mustn't lay a hand on him!!

dialogue.speaker: Green Bull
dialogue.text: You're up against a Navy Admiral!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You think I wouldn't be able to guard against such an obvious weakness?!

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
